sunk_ship_count: {battleship_rule_text} Count the ships whose entire shape is covered by red hit markers.
{battleship_rule_text} How many fleet ships have every cell hit?
{battleship_rule_text} Determine the number of sunk ships on the board.
{battleship_rule_text} Count only the fully hit ships.
partial_ship_count: {battleship_rule_text} How many ships are partially hit but not sunk?
{battleship_rule_text} Count ships with at least one red hit marker and at least one unhit cell.
{battleship_rule_text} How many fleet ships are damaged but still not sunk?
{battleship_rule_text} Determine the number of ships that have some, but not all, cells hit.
{battleship_rule_text} Count only the not-yet-sunk ships that already have a red hit marker.
named_ship_hit_cell_count: {battleship_rule_text} How many cells of {target_ship_name} have red hit markers?
{battleship_rule_text} How many cells are hit on {target_ship_name}?
{battleship_rule_text} Determine the number of red hit markers on {target_ship_name}.
{battleship_rule_text} Count only the hit cells belonging to {target_ship_name}.
named_ship_unhit_cell_count: {battleship_rule_text} How many cells of {target_ship_name} do not have red hit markers?
{battleship_rule_text} How many cells are still unhit on {target_ship_name}?
{battleship_rule_text} Determine the number of cells without red hit markers on {target_ship_name}.
{battleship_rule_text} Count only the unhit cells belonging to {target_ship_name}.
last_ship_cell_label: {battleship_rule_text} All ships are sunk except one ship with exactly one unhit cell. Which labeled cell is that unhit cell?
{battleship_rule_text} Exactly one ship is not sunk, and it is missing one cell. Choose the label of the missing cell.
{battleship_rule_text} The grid has one remaining ship with one unhit cell. Which option label marks that cell?
{battleship_rule_text} Use the fleet shapes and the hit/miss markers to find the only unhit cell of the not-yet-sunk ship. Which label marks it?
{battleship_rule_text} One fleet ship still has exactly one cell without a red hit marker. Select the labeled cell for that position.
remaining_ship_shape_label: {battleship_rule_text} Out of these five ships, one has not been hit yet. Which answer choice is it?
{battleship_rule_text} Four ships are sunk, and one fleet ship has no red hit markers. Which labeled choice is the unhit ship?
{battleship_rule_text} One of the five fleet shapes has not been hit yet. Choose its answer label.
{battleship_rule_text} Among the five answer choices, which ship shape has no red hit markers on the grid?
{battleship_rule_text} Four fleet ships are fully hit. Select the labeled choice for the ship that has not been hit.

scene:visible_battleship_grid.object_description: a Battleship tracking grid with hit markers, miss markers, and a side panel

query:sunk_ship_count.battleship_rule_text: Each fleet ship is placed exactly once on the board. A ship is sunk only when every cell of that ship has a red hit marker.
query:sunk_ship_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object mapping each sunk ship's displayed fleet-shape name to a list of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every red hit-marker cell on that ship; use an empty object if no ship is sunk
query:sunk_ship_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of ships whose every cell has a red hit marker

query:partial_ship_count.battleship_rule_text: Each fleet ship is placed exactly once on the board. A ship is sunk only when every cell of that ship has a red hit marker.
query:partial_ship_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object mapping each partially hit ship's displayed fleet-shape name to a list of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every red hit-marker cell on that ship; use an empty object if no ship is partially hit
query:partial_ship_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of ships that have at least one red hit marker but are not sunk

query:named_ship_hit_cell_count.battleship_rule_text: Each fleet ship is placed exactly once on the board. A ship is sunk only when every cell of that ship has a red hit marker.
query:named_ship_hit_cell_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the red hit-marker cells on the named ship; use an empty array if none of that ship's cells are hit
query:named_ship_hit_cell_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of cells on the named ship that have red hit markers

query:named_ship_unhit_cell_count.battleship_rule_text: Each fleet ship is placed exactly once on the board. A ship is sunk only when every cell of that ship has a red hit marker.
query:named_ship_unhit_cell_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space cell boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the named ship's intact cells; use an empty array if every cell of that ship is hit
query:named_ship_unhit_cell_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of cells on the named ship that do not have red hit markers

query:last_ship_cell_label.battleship_rule_text: Each fleet ship is placed exactly once on the board. A ship is sunk only when every cell of that ship has a red hit marker.
query:last_ship_cell_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one pixel-space point [x, y] at the center of the selected labeled cell
query:last_ship_cell_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the single selected option label shown on the board

query:remaining_ship_shape_label.battleship_rule_text: Each fleet ship is placed exactly once on the board. A ship is sunk only when every cell of that ship has a red hit marker. Exactly one ship is untouched and every other ship is sunk.
query:remaining_ship_shape_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel-space box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the selected answer choice
query:remaining_ship_shape_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the single selected answer-choice label

target_ship_name.description: Displayed fleet-shape name for the generated named-ship question.
